notes: Skill-first model. Each skill is authored once; ranges link the skill to one or more jobs.
Range `from`/`to` are optional in YYYY-MM format. Omitted = spans the whole job. Both clip to the referenced job's dates (a skill range can't extend beyond the job that owns it).

A single skill may have multiple ranges on the same jobId (e.g. used early, paused, resumed). Adjacent ranges are merged at read time so the heatmap and chart see one continuous interval where appropriate.
WORK_ITEMS no longer carries skill data. The per-card chip list is derived at loader time from SKILLS by collecting every skill with at least one range pointing at the card's jobId.

CHART_EXCLUDE behavior is unchanged: skills tagged `category: "meta"` are dropped from the chart, heatmap, and autocomplete suggestions but still render as chips on the timeline cards (so 'Front End', 'Mentoring' etc. still show under each role).

projects.title: Project: Avant
projects.text: Full-stack project for Avant, a US loan company. Utilizes React with Remix.run and PostCSS for responsiveness. Implements Cypress and Playwright for testing. Currently transitioning from JavaScript to TypeScript. Exposure and worked on the backend using Python and Django.

Actualmente en transición de JavaScript a TypeScript. Exposición y trabajo en el backend con Python y Django.

projects.title: Project: Adalabs AI Model
projects.text: Contributed to building a client-facing interface for a U.S.-based AI platform using Next.js, deployed on Vercel. The AI model—designed to assist fintechs and financial service providers—serves as a centralized source of truth for organizing and managing finance-related documentation and client data.
projects.text_es: Contribuí al desarrollo de una interfaz cliente para una plataforma de IA radicada en EE. UU., construida con Next.js y desplegada en Vercel. El modelo de IA —pensado para asistir a fintechs y proveedores de servicios financieros— funciona como fuente única de verdad para organizar y gestionar documentación financiera y datos de clientes.
